text: T-015 design. Read tasks/T-015/BRIEF.md. Produce tasks/T-015/DESIGN.md: the interaction + architecture for voice+foot-pedal control + multi-take + lyric-line punch-in (NO hardware needed): command grammar, the foot-pedal push-to-talk flow, take data model, lyric→timecode mapping, file/export layout. Commit + warroom-say.
